description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- fix(plugin): include MCP image content in tool results by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6227
- fix(site): validate next redirects by parsed origin in auth.js / 按解析后的 origin 校验登录跳转，修复开放重定向 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6309
- feat(plugin): map Claude plugin commands to custom slash commands / 将 Claude 插件 commands 映射为自定义斜杠命令 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6311
- feat(desktop): unify footer decision surface / 统一 footer 决策面 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6319
- feat: built-in reasonix-guide and unified capability diagnostics / 内置 reasonix-guide 与统一能力诊断 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6323
- feat(plugin): qualify plugin slash commands / 插件斜杠命令使用限定名称 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6326
- feat(plugin): qualify plugin skill slash names / 插件技能使用限定斜杠名称 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6328
- Park turns landing in the finishing window instead of dropping them / 修复 finishing 窗口内提交被静默丢弃 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6324
- Fix MiMo legacy tuple tool schemas / 修复 MiMo 旧版元组工具 Schema by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6327
- fix(agent): warn once per session on missing tool-call reasoning / 缺失思维链告警改为每会话一次 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6334
- Runtime profiles with delivery capability routing / 运行档、交付能力路由与质量门禁 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6322
- TUI work-mode hot switching and desktop polish / TUI 工作模式热切换与桌面打磨 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6341
- fix(error): surface the provider's real reason on 402/429/5xx and 401/403 / 402/429/5xx 与 401/403 错误透出上游真实原因 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6345
- fix(config): fall back to user default_model when a project override is unresolvable / 项目 default_model 失效时回退到用户全局默认模型 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6347
- Add configurable subagent profiles and isolated invocation / 新增可配置子智能体与隔离调用 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6310
- fix(agent): flush unconsumed steers at turn exit instead of dropping them / 回合退出时保留未消费的引导消息 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6352
- fix(desktop): keep assistant content and mid-turn steers outside the work fold / 正文与中途引导移出工作折叠 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6351
- Fix diagnostics null-array crash / 修复诊断页空数组崩溃 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6367
- Fix duplicate rich composer input / 修复富文本输入重复显示 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6361
- Open workspace panel on launch / 启动时默认展开工作区 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6371
- fix(desktop): collapse todo panel by default by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6372
- Improve review recovery, stable notice localization, and readiness UX / 优化审查恢复、通知本地化与交付检查体验 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6373
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.10...desktop-v1.17.11
